Author: NightmareXIV
Name: AntiAfkKick [Bees]
Punchline: A Dalamud plugin for preventing being auto-kicked from FFXIV due to inactivity. Install and forget, no config needed.
Description: A Dalamud plugin for preventing being auto-kicked from FFXIV due to inactivity. Install and forget, no config needed.

Author: Taurenkey, kawaii, NightmareXIV
Name: Artisan [Bees]
Punchline: A 'simple' crafting plugin.
Description: The all-in-one crafting plugin. Perfect for people with next to no knowledge about crafting rotations. No need for a library of different macros, the solvers will work dynamically to try and complete your crafts. Also provides convenient ways to craft lists of items or grind out a specific item repeatedly.
Changelog:
- Fix issue with graphical simulator not updating Raphael solutions correctly.
- Try and prevent adjusting Raphael macros to skip Excellent GS/BB combo when durability would cause a fail.

Author: erdelf, Herculezz
Name: AutoDuty [Bees]
Punchline: Dungeons while you sleep, eat, or work. (Swimsuit Shtola made easy.)
Description: A plugin to run dungeons for you with Trust, Duty Support, Squadrons, Variants, and Regular, Requires BossMod, vnavmesh and a Rotation Plugin (BossMod AutoRotation, Wrath or RotationSolverReborn)
Changelog:
## What's Changed
* Armoire Entrust Between Loops added by @erdelf in https://github.com/erdelf/AutoDuty/pull/321
* Update Duty Counter and Sanitise Inputs by @Taurenkey in https://github.com/erdelf/AutoDuty/pull/323
* Wrath settings update by @erdelf in https://github.com/erdelf/AutoDuty/pull/324
* additional armoires by @erdelf in https://github.com/erdelf/AutoDuty/pull/329
* RSR default tank targeting changed by @erdelf in https://github.com/erdelf/AutoDuty/pull/330
* Armoire: Skipping already entrusted items by @erdelf in https://github.com/erdelf/AutoDuty/pull/331

## New Contributors
* @Kagekazu made their first contribution in https://github.com/erdelf/AutoDuty/pull/327

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/erdelf/AutoDuty/compare/0.0.0.310...0.0.0.313

Author: Minmoose, Asgard and Contributors
Name: Brio [Bees]
Punchline: Enhanced GPosing! A utility for improving the G-Pose experience in FFXIV.
Description:
Brio is suite of tools that gives you advanced control to edit and pose actors during G-Pose.

- Advanced actor posing 
	- While animating
	- Adjust actor positions without them resetting
	- Overlay and graphical posing modes
- Creation of up to 239 G-Pose actors
- Creation of custom lights
- Supports integration with Penumbra, Glamourer & Customize+
- Offline import and export of MCDF files onto G-Pose actors
- Play XAT .xcp camera files
- Play/Blend animations of G-Pose actors
- Control Time/Weather in both the Overworld and G-Pose
- Change the active festivals and apply up to 4 at once
- Add/Remove Status Effects of G-Pose actors

Punchline: Simplify Gathering and Fishing to the extreme.

Author: Caraxi
Name: Honorific [Bees]
Punchline: Customized titles for you and yours.
Description: Assign custom titles to players.
TestingChangelog:
Trying something different

Please report:
- **Any cases of nameplates flashing randomly**
- Any cases of the wrong title appearing on players
- Any cases of a custom title appearing on an NPC
- Any cases of other UI behaving unexpectedly
- Any cases of a title getting stuck on a custom title after the plugin is disabled

When reporting any issues please use the `Honorific` channel in `plugin-help-forum` (<#1104305790975758336>)

Author: kawaii, NightmareXIV
Name: Hyperborea [Bees]
Punchline: What if we GPosed in the Mordion Gaol?
Description: Load and explore any zone in relative safety, mainly for taking GPoses in now inaccessible locations.

Author: Ice
Name: Ice's Cosmic Exploration (ICE) [Bees]
Punchline: Welcome to, the dark side of, the MOOOON
Description:
The one-stop shop to your cosmic exploration needs! This plugin is meant to be a collective source of being able to grind out your gather and crafter relics, while also being able to help grind out the score to 500k on each class for that sleek black mech that you want ~.

- Has the ability to re-roll missions for you until you get the desired one that you want to farm
- Crafters can be fully automated with support of artisan. 
- Fisher can also be fully automated with the support of AutoHook and Navmesh
- Botanist/Miner only need Navmesh, thanks to having gathering built in directly to the plugin <3. 
- Setup what items you want to buy from the shop for cosmocredits, or spend your planetary tokens on the cosmowheel of fortune!
Changelog:
- Fixed an issue where the scoring would overflow, resulting in a lower score than you actually had
  - This should fix any lingering items with this
- Made it to where the 2 collectable master missions just do the normal gathering
  - it's... so much better

Author: NightmareXIV
Name: Splatoon [Bees]
Punchline: Scriptable overlay engine for drawing mechanics, markers, and indicators in real-time
Description:
Splatoon is a scriptable telegraph and overlay engine for Final Fantasy XIV, built on the Dalamud plugin framework. It allows scripts to draw shapes, markers, labels, and indicators directly in the game world. These overlays can be attached to actors, positions, or events, and are rendered with precise positioning.

Splatoon does not include presets or encounter logic by default. If you want presets, you must create them yourself or import them from others.

In short, Splatoon draws things. What it draws is up to you!
Changelog: - Helper methods

Author: Nadya, Kagekazu
Name: Tidy Chat [Bees]
Punchline: Better game messages and in-depth chat filters to keep a tidy chat.
Description:
It is highly recommended to edit the default settings as you may disagree on which messages should be considered "spam"!

Provides granular filter options to filter nearly all game-related spam, leaving only important game messages in your chat.

  - Filters most spammy game messages
  - Blocks emote spam from other players
  - Condenses earned commendations into a single line
  - Shortens lengthy messages such as joining Novice Network or entering an instanced zone
  - Blocks repeated messages from appearing for a period of time
  - Automatically copies most 'with your chat mode in /say' quest dialogue to your clipboard
  - Write custom filters to Allow/Block messages!
  - And more!
Changelog:
- Add more fishing rules
- Fix emotes filter
- Add Aetherythe ticket filter
- Add Orchestrion Filter
- Add suboption to `"Show Another Player rolls"` to Show only rolls from party members
TestingChangelog: Fix GC+10%, Fix LootNotice filters (again), Add toggle for displaying Party Information when joining a party

Name: Visibility [Bees]

Author: veyn, xan_0
Name: vnavmesh [Bees]
Punchline: Move around!

Author: Team Wrath
Name: Wrath Combo [Bees]
Punchline: Condenses combos and mutually exclusive abilities onto a single button - and then some.
Description: Turns one action into many! Similar to how PvP actions work, we take an action and build a whole combo out of it. Sometimes it's as simple as a 1-2-3 combo, other times it's a full job rotation. Either way, you'll find something suited for your rotation needs.
Changelog: Please check the project's GitHub or Discord for a full changelog.

Author: keifufu
Name: XivVoices [Bees]
Punchline: Transforming Final Fantasy XIV by voicing every piece of dialogue!
Description: A plugin that voices every NPC dialogue, battle interaction, and more.

Author: daemitus, kawaii
Name: Yes Already [Bees]
Punchline: Clicks Yes in various dialogs you've specified.
Description: Tired of clicking yes in Praetorium? Can't stand using keys in dungeons? Well do I have the plugin for you! Yes Already is specifically designed to click all the annoying dialogs you've grown accustomed facerolling. Just enter the dialog text, and you'll never see it again! Also works with /regex/ and has several built-in modules for dialogs that aren't quite yes/no prompts but act like it (like desynth).
